title: Planet Killer
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Update|[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]}} {{Device |image=[[File:Planet_Killer.jpg]] |name=Planet Killer |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Superweapon/Legends|Superweapon]]{{CWACite|2|Run Mace Run}} |culture= |creators=A [[Unidentified alien scientist|scientist]] |created= |modifier= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners= |locations=[[Omphalos]] |cost= |value= |structure= |size= |material= |length=Several [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width=Several meters |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range=An entire [[Planet/Legends|planet]] {{C|theoretically}} |inscription= |markings= |purpose=Destroy an entire planet |heritage= |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] }} {{Quote|Behold, Count Dooku—the power of the Planet Killer—the ''Ultimate Weapon''!''"
"''And…?''"
"''I–I–don't understand… It should have triggered. There should be a big blast! A big light!|The Planet Killer's designer and Count Dooku|}} The '''Planet Killer''' was a large, spherical [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] designed to destroy the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] it was detonated upon. In the year [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Planet Killer's [[Unidentified alien scientist|designer]] attempted to sell the superweapon to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the Separatist movement, arranged for the Planet Killer to be [[Mission to Omphalos|tested]] on a [[Omphalos|planet]] home to a number of living organisms. However, unbeknownst to the Separatists, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] disabled the Planet Killer before it could be activated, and Dooku, considering the Planet Killer to have failed its test, had the superweapon's designer taken [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. ==Description== {{Quote|B–but—the detonator must have malfunctioned!|The planet killer's designer|}} The Planet Killer was a large, spherical [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] and [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] that was theoretically powerful enough to destroy the entirety of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] it was detonated upon. Upon explosion, the Planet Killer would supposedly generate a bright light and huge blast as it obliterated the planet. However, the superweapon's shell was not [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] resistant, and if the Planet Killer's detonator was removed, it could not be successfully activated. Set on top of a flat base, the Planet Killer stood several [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and wide. Four cone-shaped protrusions extended from and around the superweapon's midsection, and each ended in a smaller sphere. The Planet Killer was [[Color/Legends|colored]] orange, gray, and white, and had yellow light originating from small slits that encircled the weapon's perimeter. ==History== {{Quote|My colleagues and I shall simply continue the plans for our own 'Planet Killer.'|Count Dooku, following the Planet Killer's failed test|}} [[File:Planet_Killer_2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Mace Windu attacks the Planet Killer.]] The Planet Killer was created by a [[Unidentified alien scientist|non-Human designer]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] and the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Planet Killer's designer attempted to sell his creation to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the leader of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. To test the weapons' capabilities, Dooku arranged for the Planet Killer to have its power [[Mission to Omphalos|demonstrated]] on [[Omphalos]], a world teeming with a variety of living organisms. Dooku had the Planet Killer deployed on the planet, with several of his [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s and a pair of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] guarding the superweapon. Meanwhile, Dooku and the weapon's designer observed the planet aboard a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and waited for the weapon to be activated. However, the Republic discovered that the Separatists were going to decimate the planet, and dispatched [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and a number of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to prevent the Planet Killer's detonation. Despite having his [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] shot down and all of his [[Troop/Legends|troopers]] [[Death/Legends|killed]], Windu was able to singlehandedly fight past the Separatist [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] guarding the Planet Killer. With [[Mace Windu's lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]], Windu cut into the Planet Killer and removed its detonator right before it was activated and disabled the superweapon. Unaware that the Republic had interrupted the test, Dooku believed that the Planet Killer was in fact inoperable after the planet failed to explode, and had the weapon's designer taken [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] in retaliation. With the Planet Killer proven to be a failure, Dooku instead continued to pursue [[Death Star/Legends|other means]] of developing an "Ultimate Weapon." ==Behind the scenes== The Planet Killer's first and only appearance in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] was in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[Run Mace Run]]'', published in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 2]] on [[November 17]], [[2004]]. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|2|Run Mace Run}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Planet Killer}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Asesino de Planetas |nl=Planet Killer }} [[Category:Demolitions]] [[Category:Separatist projects and operations]] [[Category:Superweapons]]
